steps.title: Find the needed contrast
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference, so the sentence needs explicit comparison between traditional biennials and the MexiCali Biennial.

steps.title: Use the contrast directly
steps.content: The relevant differences are venue variety and uneven timing. Choices A, C, and D either list facts, omit the MexiCali Biennial, or blur the contrast instead of stating it. The answer is B.
